changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert global admin user (id=1) for ACC environment. Email: johndoe@example.com, Password: admin123!
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO "user" (first_name, last_name, email, role, password, created_at, last_login, enabled, validated) VALUES ('John', 'Doe', 'johndoe@example.com', 'ADMIN', '{bcrypt}$2a$10$zO/ntKU1/JDupHoNEwDlnOqORuBV/K.YCGB5x1rMSVVViayrOo.cW', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '60 days',(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), true, true);

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert organizations for ACC. Admin owns Acme, Beta, Gamma. Delta and Epsilon exist for variety.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO organization (name, slug, status, created_by, created_at) VALUES ('Acme Corporation', 'acme-corp', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '45 days'), ('Beta Industries', 'beta-industries', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '40 days'), ('Gamma Solutions', 'gamma-solutions', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '35 days'), ('Delta Technologies', 'delta-tech', 'TRIAL', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '30 days'), ('Epsilon Systems', 'epsilon-systems', 'ACTIVE', 1, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '25 days');

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert organization memberships. Admin (id=1) is OWNER of Acme, Beta, Gamma, Delta, Epsilon.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO organization_membership (user_id, organization_id, role, invited_by, joined_at) VALUES (1, (SELECT id FROM organization WHERE slug = 'acme-corp'), 'OWNER', NULL, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '45 days'), (1, (SELECT id FROM organization WHERE slug = 'beta-industries'), 'OWNER', NULL, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '40 days'), (1, (SELECT id FROM organization WHERE slug = 'gamma-solutions'), 'OWNER', NULL, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '35 days'), (1, (SELECT id FROM organization WHERE slug = 'delta-tech'), 'OWNER', NULL, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '30 days'), (1, (SELECT id FROM organization WHERE slug = 'epsilon-systems'), 'OWNER', NULL, (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '25 days');

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert personal channels for admin with varied statuses and use cases.
changeSet.sql: -- Personal channels for admin (id=1) INSERT INTO channel (name, description, user_id, organization_id, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('Backend Errors', 'Production error tracking for backend services. Monitors API failures, database issues, and service exceptions.', 1, NULL, 'ACTIVE', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '50 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '2 hours'), ('Frontend Analytics', 'User behavior and performance metrics from the web application.', 1, NULL, 'ACTIVE', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '45 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '1 day'), ('Deployment Events', 'Tracks deployments, rollbacks, and infrastructure changes across all environments.', 1, NULL, 'ACTIVE', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '55 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '30 minutes'), ('Marketing Campaigns', 'Event tracking for seasonal marketing campaigns. Paused between campaigns.', 1, NULL, 'PAUSED', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '80 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '15 days'), ('Security Alerts', 'Critical security events including failed login attempts, suspicious activity, and access violations.', 1, NULL, 'ACTIVE', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '100 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '5 minutes'), ('Test Channel', NULL, 1, NULL, 'ACTIVE', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '5 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '5 days'), ('Mobile App Events', 'User interactions and errors from the iOS and Android mobile applications.', 1, NULL, 'ACTIVE', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '40 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '6 hours'), ('Payment Processing', 'Transaction events, payment failures, refunds, and billing notifications.', 1, NULL, 'ACTIVE', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '60 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '3 hours'), ('API Gateway Logs', 'Request/response logging for the API gateway with latency metrics.', 1, NULL, 'ACTIVE', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '35 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '45 minutes'), ('Scheduled Jobs', 'Cron job executions, batch processing results, and background task monitoring.', 1, NULL, 'ACTIVE', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '30 days', (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '1 hour');

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert organization channels for Acme, Beta, Gamma, Delta, and Epsilon.

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert extensive personal watchlists for admin with channel groups and filters.

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert organization watchlists for Acme, Beta, Gamma with channel groups.

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert USER-scoped API keys for admin with varied expiration and usage patterns.

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert ORGANIZATION-scoped API keys for Acme, Beta, Gamma, Delta, Epsilon orgs.

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert API key audit records for revoked keys - admin user and organizations.

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert user event quota record for admin - 45% usage for realistic dashboard display.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO user_event_quota (user_id, event_count, period_start, updated_at) VALUES ( 1, 450, DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'), (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '2 hours' );

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert 7 days of events for admin's personal channels with realistic patterns and variance.
changeSet.sql: -- Generate events for personal channels with 5-minute intervals and 50% variance -- Pre-generate severity to ensure message matches WITH time_slots AS ( SELECT generate_series( (NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days')::timestamptz, NOW()::timestamptz, INTERVAL '5 minutes' ) AS slot ), random_slots AS ( SELECT slot FROM time_slots WHERE random() < 0.5 ), event_data AS ( SELECT c.id AS channel_id, c.name AS channel_name, rs.slot, CASE WHEN random() < 0.70 THEN 'OK' WHEN random() < 0.90 THEN 'WARNING' ELSE 'CRITICAL' END AS severity FROM channel c CROSS JOIN random_slots rs WHERE c.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.user_id = 1 AND c.organization_id IS NULL ) INSERT INTO event (channel_id, severity, title, message, metadata, timestamp) SELECT ed.channel_id, ed.severity, CASE ed.channel_name WHEN 'Backend Errors' THEN (ARRAY['API Response', 'Database Query', 'Service Call', 'Cache Hit', 'Request Processed'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] WHEN 'Frontend Analytics' THEN (ARRAY['Page View', 'User Click', 'Form Submit', 'Navigation', 'Session Start'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] WHEN 'Deployment Events' THEN (ARRAY['Build Started', 'Tests Passed', 'Deploy Complete', 'Rollback', 'Health Check'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] WHEN 'Security Alerts' THEN (ARRAY['Login Attempt', 'Token Refresh', 'Access Denied', 'Rate Limited', 'Session Valid'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] WHEN 'Mobile App Events' THEN (ARRAY['App Launch', 'Screen View', 'User Action', 'Push Received', 'Crash Report'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] WHEN 'Payment Processing' THEN (ARRAY['Payment Init', 'Payment Success', 'Payment Failed', 'Refund Issued', 'Subscription Renewed'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] WHEN 'API Gateway Logs' THEN (ARRAY['Request Received', 'Response Sent', 'Rate Limit Hit', 'Auth Failed', 'Route Matched'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] WHEN 'Scheduled Jobs' THEN (ARRAY['Job Started', 'Job Completed', 'Job Failed', 'Job Skipped', 'Job Retrying'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] ELSE (ARRAY['Event Received', 'Status Update', 'Metric Report', 'Heartbeat', 'Notification'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] END AS title, CASE ed.severity WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 'Critical issue detected - immediate attention required for ' || ed.channel_name WHEN 'WARNING' THEN 'Warning threshold exceeded in ' || ed.channel_name || ' - monitoring closely' ELSE 'Normal operation for ' || ed.channel_name || ' - all systems nominal' END AS message, jsonb_build_object( 'source', (ARRAY['api-server', 'worker-1', 'worker-2', 'scheduler', 'gateway'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int], 'channel_name', ed.channel_name, 'environment', (ARRAY['production', 'staging', 'development'])[FLOOR(random() * 3 + 1)::int], 'region', (ARRAY['us-east-1', 'eu-west-1', 'ap-southeast-1'])[FLOOR(random() * 3 + 1)::int], 'cpu_usage', ROUND((random() * 80 + 10)::numeric, 1), 'memory_mb', (random() * 4096)::int, 'response_time_ms', (random() * 500)::int, 'request_count', (random() * 1000)::int ) AS metadata, ed.slot + (random() * INTERVAL '4 minutes' - INTERVAL '2 minutes') AS timestamp FROM event_data ed ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert incident burst events to simulate realistic incident patterns.
changeSet.sql: -- Simulate 3 incident bursts in the last 7 days WITH incident_times AS ( SELECT unnest(ARRAY[ NOW() - INTERVAL '6 days' + INTERVAL '14 hours', NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days' + INTERVAL '9 hours', NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day' + INTERVAL '16 hours' ]) AS incident_start ), burst_events AS ( SELECT it.incident_start + (n * INTERVAL '30 seconds') AS event_time, n FROM incident_times it CROSS JOIN generate_series(0, 20) AS n ) INSERT INTO event (channel_id, severity, title, message, metadata, timestamp) SELECT c.id AS channel_id, CASE WHEN be.n < 5 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN be.n < 15 THEN 'WARNING' ELSE 'OK' END AS severity, CASE WHEN be.n < 5 THEN 'Incident Detected' WHEN be.n < 15 THEN 'Recovery In Progress' ELSE 'Service Restored' END AS title, CASE WHEN be.n < 5 THEN 'Critical incident detected in ' || c.name || ' - escalating to on-call team' WHEN be.n < 15 THEN 'Recovery actions in progress for ' || c.name || ' - monitoring metrics' ELSE 'Service fully restored for ' || c.name || ' - incident resolved' END AS message, jsonb_build_object( 'source', 'incident-detector', 'channel_name', c.name, 'incident_id', 'INC-' || LPAD((random() * 9999)::int::text, 4, '0'), 'severity_level', CASE WHEN be.n < 5 THEN 'P1' WHEN be.n < 15 THEN 'P2' ELSE 'P3' END, 'affected_users', (random() * 1000)::int ) AS metadata, be.event_time AS timestamp FROM channel c CROSS JOIN burst_events be WHERE c.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.user_id = 1 AND c.organization_id IS NULL AND c.name IN ('Backend Errors', 'Security Alerts') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Insert 7 days of events for organization channels.
changeSet.sql: -- Generate events for organization channels WITH time_slots AS ( SELECT generate_series( (NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days')::timestamptz, NOW()::timestamptz, INTERVAL '10 minutes' ) AS slot ), random_slots AS ( SELECT slot FROM time_slots WHERE random() < 0.4 ) INSERT INTO event (channel_id, severity, title, message, metadata, timestamp) SELECT c.id AS channel_id, CASE WHEN random() < 0.75 THEN 'OK' WHEN random() < 0.92 THEN 'WARNING' ELSE 'CRITICAL' END AS severity, CASE WHEN c.name LIKE 'Acme%' THEN (ARRAY['Deployment', 'Build Success', 'Test Pass', 'API Call', 'User Action'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] WHEN c.name LIKE 'Beta%' THEN (ARRAY['Sensor Reading', 'Machine Status', 'Quality Check', 'Inventory Update', 'Maintenance Alert'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] WHEN c.name LIKE 'Gamma%' THEN (ARRAY['Portal Login', 'Ticket Created', 'Ticket Resolved', 'User Feedback', 'Report Generated'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] WHEN c.name LIKE 'Delta%' THEN (ARRAY['Experiment Run', 'Test Executed', 'Data Collected', 'Analysis Complete', 'Model Trained'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] WHEN c.name LIKE 'Epsilon%' THEN (ARRAY['Instance Scaled', 'DB Query', 'Backup Complete', 'Alert Triggered', 'Resource Usage'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] ELSE (ARRAY['Event', 'Update', 'Status', 'Alert', 'Info'])[FLOOR(random() * 5 + 1)::int] END AS title, 'Event from ' || c.name || ' - ' || CASE WHEN random() < 0.1 THEN 'requires attention' WHEN random() < 0.3 THEN 'threshold warning' ELSE 'normal operation' END AS message, jsonb_build_object( 'source', 'org-monitor', 'channel_name', c.name, 'organization', (SELECT slug FROM organization WHERE id = c.organization_id), 'environment', (ARRAY['production', 'staging'])[FLOOR(random() * 2 + 1)::int], 'metric_value', ROUND((random() * 100)::numeric, 2) ) AS metadata, rs.slot + (random() * INTERVAL '8 minutes' - INTERVAL '4 minutes') AS timestamp FROM channel c CROSS JOIN random_slots rs WHERE c.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.organization_id IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
